data.title: London IPO Fundarising Falls To A Thirty Year Low In First Half
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, July 04, 2025- London IPO fundraising in the first half of 2025 fell to a thirty-year low as the UK failed to attract huge listings and as companies sought listings in New York. According to new data from Dealogic, the five debuts on the London market in the first six months of 2025 […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/london-ipo-fundarising-falls-to-a-thirty-year-low-in-first-half

data.title: Bitcoin's Fourth of July Journey: From Revolutionary Vision To Wall Street's Darling
data.description:

source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/25/07/46261889/bitcoins-fourth-of-july-journey-from-revolutionary-vision-to-wall-streets-darling?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Crypto Dumps Hard On Fear of Satoshi Era Bitcoin Whales Moving $9 Billion Worth of BTC After 14 Years
data.description:
Cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a significant decline as investors react to increasing fears surrounding the potential impact of Bitcoin whales—those early adopters who mined or acquired large quantities of Bitcoin during the Satoshi era—moving an astonishing $9 billion worth of BTC for the first time in 14 years. This sudden movement of such a substantial amount of Bitcoin has sparked concern among traders and analysts, leading to heightened selling pressure and a notable downtrend in crypto prices. The market is currently grappling with uncertainty, as participants speculate on the implications of these large transactions and the motivations behind them, which has contributed to widespread panic and sell-offs in various digital currencies.
source: https://blocknews.com/crypto-dumps-hard-on-fear-of-satoshi-era-bitcoin-whales-moving-9-billion-worth-of-btc-after-14-years/

data.title: Crypto Dumps Hard On Fear of Satoshi Era Bitcoin Whales Moving $9 Billion Worth of BTC After 14 Years
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market experienced a significant downturn as panic spread among investors, triggered by the fear that Bitcoin whales from the Satoshi era—early adopters and large holders of BTC—were about to move a staggering $9 billion worth of Bitcoin after holding it for an impressive 14 years. This sudden potential shift in such a substantial amount of BTC raised concerns about market stability, leading to a widespread sell-off as traders reacted to the uncertainty surrounding these long-dormant coins finally seeing movement.
source: https://blocknews.com/crypto-dumps-hard-on-fear-satoshi-era-bitcoin-whales-moving-9-billion-worth-of-btc-after-14-years/

data.title: EU Negotiators Struggle to Make Progress in U.S. Trade Talks
data.description: According to Odaily, EU negotiators have not achieved a breakthrough in trade discussions with the United States. EU diplomats have indicated that the talks will continue through the weekend. The diplomats revealed that the scale of the EU's second round of countermeasures has been reduced from the initial 95 billion euros to 72 billion euros. EU negotiators stated that if a more comprehensive trade agreement cannot be reached, the EU will seek to extend the tariff suspension period.

data.title: World Liberty Financial Submits WLFI Transferability Proposal: ‘We’re Making History’
data.description:
TL;DR World Liberty Financial has introduced a proposal to make its WLFI token transferable, signaling a major leap toward decentralization. If approved, a portion of tokens held by early supporters will be unlocked. The proposal also sets the foundation for future governance decisions through token-holder voting and aims to increase participation in WLFI’s expanding ecosystem. . . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/world-liberty-financial-submits-wlfi-transferability-proposal-were-making-history/

data.title: Canada Advances Digital Currency Exploration with Retail CBDC System
data.description: According to Odaily, the Bank of Canada has made significant progress in exploring the technical feasibility of a digital Canadian dollar. The institution has proposed a system specifically designed for retail central bank digital currency (CBDC), focusing on facilitating simple everyday transactions. The Canadian central bank team has examined the OpenCBDC 2PC model, developed in collaboration with the Massachusetts Institute of Technology's Digital Currency Initiative. This model prioritizes privacy, speed, and decentralization, allowing users to hold digital funds directly, akin to digital cash.

data.title: EU fails to achieve breakthrough in trade talks with US
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: EU negotiators failed to make a breakthrough in the US trade talks, and EU diplomats said the negotiations will continue until the weekend. EU diplomats revealed that the scale of the EU's second round of countermeasures has been reduced from the initial 95 billion euros to 72 billion euros. EU negotiators said that if a more comprehensive trade agreement cannot be reached, the EU will seek to extend the tariff suspension period. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ondo Acquires Oasis Pro to Develop Regulated Tokenized Securities Ecosystem
data.description:
TL;DR Ondo Finance announced the acquisition of Oasis Pro, a U. S. -regulated broker, to secure licenses enabling it to operate tokenized assets. The deal includes broker-dealer, ATS, and transfer agent licenses, aiming to launch tokenized stocks in both U. S. and global markets. The firm already manages over $1. 4 billion in assets and joins the growing trend. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/ondo-acquires-oasis-pro-to-develop-regulated-tokenized-securities-ecosystem/

data.title: Bank of Canada explores technical path for retail CBDC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Bank of Canada has taken an important step in exploring the technical feasibility of the digital Canadian dollar, proposing a system designed specifically for retail central bank digital currency (CBDC), focusing on simple daily payments. It is reported that the Bank of Canada team examined the OpenCBDC 2PC model, which was developed in collaboration with the MIT Digital Currency Initiative. Its design prioritizes privacy, speed, and decentralization, allowing users to hold digital funds directly, just like digital cash. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analysis: Non-farm payrolls report won't change Fed's wait-and-see stance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gold experienced temporary pressure in the previous trading day after non-farm payrolls data showed that the U.S. economy added significantly more jobs than expected and the unemployment rate unexpectedly fell. However, Linh Tran, an analyst at XS.com, said in a report that the report did not indicate an overheated economy, but rather showed a relatively stable growth rate. Tran said this was not enough to force the Federal Reserve to reconsider its wait-and-see stance on monetary policy, which is why gold prices did not fall further. (Jinshi)

data.title: “Insider whales” once again increase their short positions in Bitcoin and Ethereum, with current losses exceeding $14 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, after being partially liquidated 10 times in a row, the "Insider Whale" once again increased his short positions in Bitcoin (40x leverage) and Ethereum (25x leverage). He has lost $16 million in this transaction. Overall, his total loss has exceeded $14 million.
